tracks.meaning: a preliminary version of a document, plan, or creative work that is not yet final
a preliminary version of a proposal, contract, or agreement presented for review and revision
a preliminary written version of a legal document or legislation before final enactment
a system of selecting conscripts or military personnel for service
a current of cool air in a room or building that causes discomfort
the act of pulling or dragging something with effort or force
the depth of water a ship requires to float without running aground
a serving of beer or other liquid dispensed directly from a tap or barrel
a dose of medicine or a medicinal drink taken in one swallow
to move slowly or reluctantly in a particular direction
to drag and drop an item or file using a mouse or touch interface
a demand for payment of money owed, especially through a bank or financial institution
